Evaluation & Admission

Once your application is received, initially there will be elimination process in which our team will review your application to decide its validity. Secondly, given that you pass the elimination process successfully, there will be an evaluation process in which your application is evaluated in terms of academic merit by Admissions Committee including the Dean of the releated College. The Admissions Committee will examine your certificates, exam results, and other required documents to evaluate your application. Virtual interviews may be held with the candidate via Blackboard or telephone, if necessary.

A decision letter is sent to your e-mail address once your application is reviewed and a decision is made.
